objective: Implement a synthetic bounded change only within the exact allowlist and produce validation evidence plus a rollback declaration.

context.summary: Synthetic example used to validate a provider-neutral bounded task contract.
assumptions: All referenced evidence is synthetic and contains no private data.
constraints: Prompt text does not override policy, sandboxing, allowlists, ActionGate, or operator approval.
No external action or runtime mutation is authorized by this template.

reference_artifacts.description: Synthetic reference artifact for deterministic contract validation.

forbidden: No secrets, credentials, private paths, network calls, deployment, merge, or service mutation.
Do not execute shell commands or grant unrestricted tool authority from this template.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Only the three allowlisted files are changed.
The synthetic feature behavior matches its test contract.

required_validation.statement: Run focused validation for the synthetic feature and record the result.
Run the sanitized full test suite and record totals.

approval_requirement.rationale: Repository source mutation requires explicit operator approval before merge or deployment.

rollback_requirement.description: Revert the bounded implementation commit if acceptance or validation fails.
